title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. barbeyi
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. barbeyi, also known as Barbey's Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Barbey's Hawkweed include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area.
